# Support

Looking for help with RocketRide? Here's where to go.

## Documentation

- **[Documentation site](https://docs.rocketride.ai)**: guides, tutorials, API reference
- **[Build system docs](docs/README-builder.md)**: building from source
- **[Client library docs](docs/README-clients.md)**: TypeScript, Python, MCP SDKs

## Getting Help

- **[GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/rocketride-org/rocketride-server/discussions)**: ask questions, share ideas, connect with the community
- **[Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/rocketride)**: search existing answers or ask a new question with the `rocketride` tag

## Reporting Bugs

Found a bug? Please [open an issue](https://github.com/rocketride-org/rocketride-server/issues/new/choose) using the bug report template.

## Security Issues

For security vulnerabilities, please see our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md). Do **not** open a public issue for security concerns.

## What Doesn't Belong in Issues

GitHub Issues are for **bug reports** and **feature requests** only. Support questions opened as issues will be converted to Discussions.
